steps.title: Find the value of $x + y$
steps.content: Then $x+y=3+10=13$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Adding the second equation of the given system to the first equation yields $5x+\left(-4x+y\right)=15+\left(-2\right)$, which is equivalent to $x+y=13$. So the value of $x+y$ is $13$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $-(x+y)$.

steps.content: Choice D is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
